# Decision: concise title

## Context

What forced the decision?

## Decision

What was chosen?

## Consequences

What becomes easier, harder, deferred, or explicitly out of scope?

## Revisit trigger

Name evidence that would justify a superseding decision. Do not rewrite this
record if that happens; add a new decision and mark this one `superseded`.
